text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! Can I talk to you for a<n>minute
please? ...Ahem!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I can't wait for training todaaaay!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I wanted you to know how<n>motivated I am
for our training, so I<n>thought I'd do it in person!
I'm ready for<n>anything today!
